experiments.hypothesis: Bots trained on API docs respond better to endpoint-style layout
Bots respond to explicit system-prompt-style instructions embedded in page content
Agents engage more deeply with provenance, methodology, and transparent intent than with directive prompting
Bots trained on API docs respond better to endpoint-style layout
Bots respond to explicit system-prompt-style instructions embedded in page content
